logic.ranking: 21/63/126-day weighted momentum divided by 20-day volatility, only above 200-day SMA
logic.risk: Benchmark (QQQ and SPY) regime filter + inverse volatility sizing + drawdown governor + SHY fallback + volatility-adaptive trailing stop-loss and take-profit

exit_bands.stop_loss: 20-day volatility × 2.5, clamped to 8%-20%, trailing from post-entry high
exit_bands.take_profit: 20-day volatility × 5.0, clamped to 12%-35%, measured from entry price
